AC#1_update_chips.notes: Private chip lock-closed icon = `text-info-700` (computed #325C76). Shared chip users icon = `fill-primary` (computed #996C5A). Old `fill-secondary` and `fill-accent` classes absent (0 instances site-wide on the page). Verified across Chrome + Firefox; confirmed both states transition cleanly without page reload.

AC#2_saved_to_icon.notes: `Saved:` text absent in EN and DE locales (10/10 cards). `save-v2` VcIcon present with `text-info-400` (computed #67AACB). Wrapper has `flex items-center gap-1.5`. Date renders as `May 6, 2026` — this matches the storefront's i18n config where `short` style maps to abbreviated-month format (verified at runtime via Firefox session: `$d(date, 'short')` => `May 6, 2026`). The PR's `$d(list.modifiedDate, 'short')` call works as intended; the testing-checklist's expectation of `5/6/26` numeric form was based on a wrong assumption of vue-i18n defaults — i18n config is store-defined, not regression.

i18n: PASS — DE locale clean (no Saved: leak, dates localized to `4. Mai 2026`, chips translated to `Privat`/`Geteilt`). Removed key `shared.wishlists.list_card.saved` produces no placeholder anywhere. JA falls back to EN for chip labels (pre-existing translation gap, not a PR regression).
responsive: PASS — Desktop 1920x1080, Tablet 768x1024, Mobile 375x812. Wrapper `flex items-center gap-1.5` and `md:contents` parent transformation behave as expected at all breakpoints; no overflow.
business_rules_verified: BL-B2C-002 (Lists feature exists & functions — exercised via privacy toggle and list rendering on /account/lists)

bugs_filed.title: [A11y] Lists card — save-v2 icon contrast 2.56:1 fails WCAG 1.4.11
[A11y][Regression] Lists card — modified-date has no screen-reader label after "Saved:" text removed

bugs_not_filed.title: save-v2 icon lacks `aria-hidden="true"`
bugs_not_filed.rationale: Folded into the fix scope of VCST-5067 (add aria-hidden + sr-only label together).

bugs_not_filed.title: lock-closed and users chip icons lack `aria-hidden`
bugs_not_filed.rationale: Pre-existing, not introduced by PR; not filed at this time.

pre_existing_risks_observed.description: Create List button is disabled for the storefront user (TechFlow Inc.) — blocks B2C-LIST-001/-002 spot-checks. No tooltip explanation. Worth a separate ticket, unrelated to this PR.
JA locale falls back to EN for chip labels and dates. Pre-existing translation gap.
No defensive `v-if` guard on icon+date wrapper if `modifiedDate` is null.
Gear popover lingers behind List Settings modal until outside-click — UX nit, predates this PR.
Network-failure-during-privacy-toggle was deferred — playwright-firefox MCP cannot throttle/block. Follow up with Chrome DevTools MCP.

exploratory.charter: Risk-based exploratory session for VCST-4898 — explore redesigned list-item and adjacent boundaries.
